messages.history_text: Farai Mbidzo came to Germany from Zimbabwe as a professional football player, but began to realize his musical talent as a songwriter and singer with his band Oneness in 2005.{br}{br}He could quickly pass on his love for reggae to his fellow musicians. This passion and joy of life bring Oneness closer to the audience while creating a danceable reggae mix of roots, dancehall and R'n'B, which is not limited to any specific target or age group.{br}{br}"Oneness" means unity; connecting different people and different situations in life through music is the idea behind it.
messages.music_sub: A selection of snippets of our original songs - enjoy listening!
messages.shows_text: Check out our upcoming shows and use the calender download function and the link to the location.
